
## From BI to AI: Making Data-Driven Decisions with Agentic AI<br><br>![](RiceBusiness-transparent-logo-sm.png){width=40%}


### Instructor

[Kerry Back](https://kerryback.com)<br> (<a href="mailto:kerry.e.back@rice.edu">kerry.e.back@rice.edu)</a><br>
J. Howard Creekmore Professor of Finance and Professor of Economics

### Course Description

AI agents that understand plain English are transforming how professionals work — generating charts, writing documents, building analyses, and querying enterprise data. In this four-week program, you will use AI tools to boost your personal productivity and you will learn about enterprise AI deployment. You will leave equipped with tools you can immediately use in your daily work and a concrete strategy for bringing AI-powered capabilities to your organization.

### Course Resources

The course provides two online resources.  The XYZ Corp Simulation is an AI agent for a hypothetical multi-division company running 10 different enterprise data systems.  We will see how the agent develops SQL queries targeted to the different databases from plain English prompts, how it merges data from different databases, and how it creates charts, tables, Excel workbooks, Word docs, and PowerPoint decks.

The AI Lab provides each student with access to Claude Code, which is currently the most popular AI coding tool.  Through the lab, students get hands-on exposure to AI coding without needing to install any software and without needing to subscribe to any AI providers.
